text: This is the Restart Scheme companion app, delivered by Maximus U-K on behalf of the Department for Work and Pensions. Let's walk through one customer's full journey back to work, from referral to their very first day on the job.

We start on the customer's phone. Daniel has three things from the scheme: his Messages, his Mail, and the Restart app itself. On the right, a journey rail lets us fire each real touchpoint, one at a time.
Step one. Within forty-eight hours of his referral, Daniel gets a warm welcome text. Notice the banner slides in just like a real iPhone notification. Let's tap it to open the conversation.
His adviser introduces herself, with no pressure and at his pace. Daniel can reply using a quick tap, or type his own message. Let's tap, yes, book it.
Watch the typing indicator, then a genuine, encouraging reply. Every message is two-way, so the journey always feels human.
Step two. His first appointment is booked by text, with options to confirm or rearrange. This is the diagnostic, where skills, goals and any barriers are talked through together.
Step three moves to email. After the diagnostic, Daniel's adviser sends a personalised action plan. Let's open it.
Here's his goal, this week's three steps, and a clear action box. Travel costs and work clothing are covered, and he can reply to confirm he's happy, right from the email.
Step four. Now the Restart app itself sends a push. His C-V is ready, and a fully-funded Level Two course has been matched to local demand. Let's open the app.
This is the heart of the experience. A progress bar tracks his journey to work, and every touchpoint is laid out as a timeline, so Daniel can always see how far he's come and what's next.
Step five, the moment it all builds towards. A vacancy, a ninety-two percent match to his skills and his travel area. A warehouse role, twenty-five thousand four hundred pounds. One tap to apply.
He applies in a single tap, and his adviser is notified instantly. No forms, no friction.
Step six. The employer wants to meet him. By text, his adviser confirms the interview, shares prep notes, and covers his travel. He can even request a prep call.
Step seven. The offer email. Let's open the best message in the whole journey.
Daniel got the job. The offer, the salary, his start date, and crucially, a plain-English explanation that he'll be better off in work as Universal Credit tapers. He accepts with one reply.
Step eight. His first shift is done, but support doesn't stop. The scheme checks in weekly for six months, helping him settle, and progress.
And there it is. The progress bar reaches one hundred percent. Every stage complete, every channel, SMS, email, and app, working together as one journey.

Finally, the whole journey can be reset and replayed in seconds, perfect for a demo. That's the Maximus Restart experience: human, joined-up, and built to get people back to work. Thanks for watching.
